name: Chinese Beef Kebabs
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb beef sirloin, tenderloin, or top round, cut into strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine marinade ingredients in a bowl and marinate the meat for 3 hours or overnight in the refrigerator.
2. Cut vegetables into similar-sized pieces as the meat strips.
3. Thread alternating pieces of meat, vegetables, and lemon wedges onto skewers.
4. Brush the skewers with the remaining marinade.
5. Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
6. Place the skewers on the hot part of the grill and cook for 8-12 minutes, turning occasionally, until the meat is cooked through and lightly charred.
